_meta.notes: v8 passed all hard rules. Only WARN: Government ASP flat across forecast years.

title: China IDC Colocation Market Sizing
market_boundary: 中国第三方IDC托管收入，不含运营商自用和云服务商自建
unit_definition: 1 MW IT Load = rated IT power capacity of the data center

anchors.anchor_source: 信通院/赛迪 2024: China IDC market ~RMB350-400B (~$48-55B)

segments.name: Hyperscale Cloud Providers

sub_segments.name: Alibaba Cloud
sub_segments.source: Estimated based on market share and capacity expansion plans

sub_segments.name: Tencent Cloud
sub_segments.source: Estimated based on market share and capacity expansion plans

segments.asp_rationale: Hyperscalers have strongest bargaining power; ASP declining ~3-4% YoY due to volume discounts and competition

segments.name: Enterprise Customers (Finance)
segments.asp_rationale: Finance sector pays premium for compliance, redundancy, proximity to exchanges; slight decline as market matures

segments.name: Government & Public Sector
segments.asp_rationale: Government contracts are fixed-price multi-year; ASP stable. [WARN: flat forecast — acceptable for this segment]

segments.name: Other Enterprises (Manufacturing, Retail)
segments.asp_rationale: Mid-tier pricing; gradual decline as cloud migration reduces on-prem demand

segments.name: AI/ML and High-Performance Computing
segments.asp_rationale: Highest ASP due to power density and cooling requirements; declining as GPU efficiency improves

price_mechanism.structural_vs_cyclical: Structural growth driven by digitalization and AI, with cyclical fluctuations based on economic conditions

players.name: GDS Holdings

players.notes: Major IDC provider in China, state-owned. Utilization declining as capacity expands faster than demand.

players.revenue_source: Annual report / Estimated: Output × avg ASP

investment_conclusion.best_window: 2024-2026: AI-driven demand surge + supply constrained by power/land approvals
investment_conclusion.upside_catalyst: AI training cluster buildout accelerates; government data sovereignty mandates increase captive demand
investment_conclusion.downside_risk: Hyperscaler self-build reduces third-party demand; power grid constraints delay new capacity
investment_conclusion.notes: Structural growth story intact; near-term risk from hyperscaler self-build and macro slowdown
